probability_policy.explanation: Because calibration and high-confidence slices are not promotion-ready, shadow probabilities should be shrunk toward 50% and high-confidence language should be disabled.

blockers: clean settled samples below promotion threshold: 160 < 500
warnings: walk_forward_predictions unavailable: No columns to parse from file
next_actions: Do not replace official prediction model.
Use shadow shrinkage only for research display and diagnostics.
Disable high-confidence language until high_65_plus ECE improves.
Treat away and underdog slices as tracking-only until slice metrics improve.
Prioritize calibration, Brier, LogLoss, and CLV over raw accuracy.
